reason: Known Next.js 14 pin tradeoff — project was explicitly built against Next.js 14, and the only fix path is a major upgrade to Next 16 (breaking change). Deliberately deferred to its own dedicated session rather than force-upgrading late at night on 2026-07-05. See README.md 'Known limitations'. Includes postcss's GHSA-qx2v-qp2m-jg93 (moderate on its own, but bundled into next's combined high-severity finding since next depends on the vulnerable postcss version — same Next 16 fix). Revisit and shrink this list when the Next 16 migration happens — don't just keep adding to it.
